name: hub-polish
authoritative_note: When kickoff phrases match, read ONLY this file and the handoff. Do not reload the full original 10-item wish list from chat history.

gates.push: only if user explicitly asked for push in this run or repo-wide push policy

execution.order: strict wave id order; skip done; stop on blocked
after_each_wave: Mark wave done with commit SHA
If max_waves_per_session reached or context heavy, stop and tell user to send the same kickoff phrase again

waves.title: Archive brain — preview maturity, stems, titles
acceptance: Main audio preview uses production maturity ladder (sketch < session bounce < demo < prod < mix < master)
Drum/stem files demoted; Anne Monsters fixture does not pick drums
Display title inferred from winning preview (e.g. 90s Rave folder -> Graffiti)
PreviewConfidenceRankerTests and WaveAPreviewAndTitleTests pass

waves.title: Archive roots — persist + dev default
acceptance: User-selected archive roots persist via SettingsStore
NIKO_MUSIC_HUB_DEV_ARCHIVE_ROOT or Debug ~/Music/00_Cubase Project when empty and folder exists
Fixture/E2E still use NIKO_MUSIC_HUB_FIXTURE_ROOT

waves.title: Downloader — format pickers
acceptance: Menu pickers: audio only vs video+audio; secondary format/quality picker
Choice persisted; yt-dlp -f and extract-audio flags match selection
DownloadFormatSelectionTests pass

waves.title: BPM tapper — algorithm
acceptance: Short research note docs/bpm-tapper-algorithm.md (what changed and why)
TempoEstimator feels accurate on fixture/simulated tap intervals (120, 128, odd tuples)
Existing BPM tapper UX unchanged unless clearly better
FeatureBPMTapper tests green
hints: Compare rolling average + outlier handling vs common tap-tempo apps

waves.title: WAV converter — FFmpeg path UX
acceptance: When helper health shows FFmpeg green, converter does not nag to pick binary again
Uses settings path or auto-detect consistently with health strip
Tests cover already-configured path path
hints: User report: green in lower left but still asked to choose ffmpeg

waves.title: UI chrome — inbox + sidebars
acceptance: Output inbox cards: keep filename; drop noisy Available / sample-rate / bit-depth / channel rows
Whole card draggable to DAW; remove redundant Drag to DAW button if card drag works
User can collapse/hide left and right sidebars
Smoke/E2E still pass or updated deliberately

waves.title: Liquid Glass — native chrome
acceptance: Adopt native Liquid Glass (glassEffect / platform APIs) where deployment target allows
Guard with availability checks; no broken build on older macOS
Do last — do not refactor ranking/downloader logic in same wave
Visual pass on shell + one tool surface documented in handoff
hints: Run only after D–F or explicitly if user reprioritizes
